phoneticUs: 藢忙n藢蓱藧vju藞le瑟蕛蓹n; 藢忙n蓱藧vj蓹藞le瑟蕛蓹n; 藢忙n藢o蕣vju藞le瑟蕛蓹n; 藢忙n藢o蕣vj蓹藞le瑟蕛蓹n
examples: Results ASR characterized by obesity and anovulation.
Objective To study the effect of artificial fertilization on infertility from anovulation.
Polycystic ovary syndrome (PCOS) is defined as a syndrome of ovarian hyperandrogenism and chronic anovulation.
